case_title: YULIYA SOKOLOVA VS. MATTHEW THOMAS SCHULER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO DAVID MCDOANLD FILED BY SOKOLOVA, YULIYA DBA  VALENCIA AUTO
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SOKOLOVA, YULIYA DBA  VALENCIA AUTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOKOLOVA, YULIYA DBA  VALENCIA AUTO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,708.63 FILED BY SOKOLOVA, YULIYA DBA  VALENCIA AUTO AS TO DEFENDANT SCHULER, MATTHEW THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDCIE TO PLAINTIFF REFILING AT A LATER DATE. THE COURT FINDS THAT WITHOUT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE FROM EITHER THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL AND/OR THE THIRD PARTY WHO ALLEGEDLY BOUGHT THE VEHICLE FROM PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DOESN'T HAVE THE AUTHORITY TO ISSUE AN ORDER TO THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL TO RELEASE THE VEHICLE IN QUESTION TO PLAINTIFF, OR TO AWARD DAMAGES AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MAY RE-FILE THIS ACTION AT A LATER DATE IF HE CAN PROVIDE FURTHER EVIDENCE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHULER, MATTHEW THOMAS
